design_goal: Smallest scheduled fact set that materially reduces surprise, explains posture shifts, or justifies evaluation slicing for NVDA desk cognition.

repo_fit.import_style: store raw layer artefacts, derive narrow runtime tags from them, emit DMP v2 packets that reference the source artefacts

layers.title: NVDA and direct read-through corporate catalysts

coverage_notes: This bundle deliberately excludes broad foreign earnings calendars and low-impact U.S. data.
Corporate catalyst layer stores confirmed events only; no speculative earnings dates are inserted.
Raw calendar may be broader than runtime references. Runtime should consume derived tags, not every raw event.
